# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }} The personal blog, travel galleries, and portfolio of QSD. Essays live under /posts/, photographic voyages under /voyage/.

## Posts

{% assign posts = site.posts | sort: "date" | reverse -%}
{% for post in posts -%}
- [{{ post.title | strip_html | strip_newlines | strip }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}){% if post.excerpt %}: {{ post.excerpt | strip_html | strip_newlines | strip | truncate: 140 }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
## Voyages

{% endfor %}
